title: Notification No.84/2004-Cus(NT), dated 06.07.2004
text: 6th July, 2004 Notification No.84/2004-Customs (N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Export Promotion), New Customs House , Mumbai to act as Commissioner of Customs (Import), Jawahar Customs House, Nhava Sheva and Commissioner of Customs ( General), Mumbai for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice , pertaining to M/s. Gitanjali Chemicals Pvt. Ltd., Ground Floor, Madhukunj , Shankar Ghanekar Marg , Prabhadevi , Mumbai-400025 issued vide F.No.DRI/BZU/B/Inv-26/2002/390 to 396, dated the 27th February , 2004, by the Additional Director General, Mumbai Zonal Unit, 3rd/4th Floor, Hotel Waldorf Building, 16, Arthur Bunde Road, Colaba , Mumbai-400006. F.NO.437/26/2004-CUS.IV D.S.Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
